\'ak 'atro-Gocara Connected with the subject of Gocara
or planetary transits there is a method of finding out whether a
particular period is favourable or not. This is done by noting
the nature of the star occupied by the Sun m transit and its

TRANSITS 251
relationship with one's natal asterism and some other stars which
bear close kinship with that. For this purpose a diagram is
needed, which is called the Saptasaldka-Cakra. In this figure
what you have to do is that you should draw seven horizontal
lines and seven vertical lines crossing the previous ones. While
drawing the lines see that the ends of all the lines jut out so that
you may get 28 points. In this scheme there is one more asterism
called Abhijit which comes in between Uttarasadha and Sravana,
The first asterism that should be written at the point in the
